case_title: DAVID YEE VS. RUDI WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15138098) FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, RUDI

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, RUDI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-15-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-22-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100001344) FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, RUDI ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 HOURS

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-16-2015 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED) ON NOV-19-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. MARYANN DRESNER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF HAS A STIPULATED JUDGMENT AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT BUT STILL WAITING ON CLIENT'S SIGNATURE. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-19-2015 - CASE SETTLED. MARYANN DRESNER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF WILL ELECTRONICALLY FILE THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON FEB-04-2020 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58245921) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF YEE, DAVID
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-16-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-15-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, RUDI $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-04-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
